prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial is an animated sequence with simple line drawings and flat colors.

At the start, the image is very dark and hard to see clearly. A person appears to be seated in a blue armchair in a sparse room, with a window or framed background shape behind them. Another dark shape or figure is partially visible at the far left edge, but details are unclear.

The next clear shot shows a close-up of a smiling animated woman with orange-blond hair, seated in a blue armchair. She wears a pink top and looks upward toward a large yellow circular shape entering from the upper left, possibly a stylized sun or bright light. The background is mostly white.

The following frame is almost entirely white, with only a small red circular shape partly visible at the far left edge. The exact object or transition is unclear from the sampled frame.

Later, the scene changes to a doorway or interior wall background. Two animated adults are shown smiling. A man in a white shirt stands on the left wearing a dark scarf with red stripes. The woman from earlier stands behind him on the right, also smiling, and appears to be helping place or adjust another dark scarf with red stripes around him. Both figures look cheerful and energetic.

The final section shows a product pack centered against a light blue background. The package reads: “Non-Drowsy SUDAFED,” “Maximum Strength,” and “NASAL DECONGESTANT.” Smaller text below says it is for “Nasal & Sinus Congestion due to Colds & Allergies.” Two small red circular graphics appear near the lower right of the box design.

In the last frame, the same Sudafed package remains centered, and an additional line of black text appears below it: “The difference between a clear head and medicine head.”
